accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and the IHRA/INA context is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the F/M category descriptions are accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill's purpose to revoke/deny student visas for antisemitic conduct.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes the amendment adding subsection (s) to section 214 of the INA.

exceptions_conditions.why: Captures the dual conditions including the foreign policy consequences determination under 237(a)(4)(C)(i).

effective_dates.why: Notes provisions apply to conduct on or after enactment and the introduction/referral date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers both Section 2 and Section 3 operative effects accurately.

concise.why: No padding or filler; appropriately detailed.

correct_entities.why: Secretary of State, IHRA, State Department, INA, and Judiciary Committee all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The May 26, 2016 date and April 10, 2025 introduction date are correct.
